introduction: This presentation explores the recent social media campaign's performance, particularly focusing on customer testimonials. We'll delve into the engagement metrics and discuss our strategic implications.

subsections.heading: Overview of Social Media Campaigns
subsections.content:
• Elexion has been leveraging social media platforms for marketing since 2022
• The company has utilized platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn to engage potential customers
• The marketing team uses a mix of organic and paid strategies to increase brand visibility
• In 2024, Elexion spent approximately 15% of its marketing budget on social media ads
• The company has seen a steady increase in its social media following, with a 25% increase in followers in 2024 compared to 2023
• The marketing department works closely with R&D to ensure product announcements align with social media campaigns
subsections.justification: This slide discusses general social media strategy and history, not the specific customer testimonial campaign's success.

subsections.heading: Customer Testimonial Campaign Engagement
subsections.content:
• Testimonial campaigns have been a part of Elexion's marketing strategy since 2023
• Typically, such campaigns are launched in Q3 to align with the release of new models
• Testimonial campaigns involve sourcing stories from satisfied customers and sharing them on social media
• Elexion's marketing team collaborates with the customer service department to identify potential testimonial candidates
• The company has seen a positive response to these campaigns, with an increase in website traffic during these periods
• Past campaigns have showcased a variety of customer experiences, from daily commuting to long-distance travel
subsections.justification: The slide focuses on the general process and history of testimonial campaigns, not the specific campaign's engagement metrics.

subsections.heading: Implications on Future Digital Marketing Strategies
subsections.content:
• Elexion plans to increase its investment in digital marketing by 20% in 2026
• The company is exploring new digital channels, such as TikTok and Snapchat, to reach younger audiences
• Elexion is considering implementing AI chatbots on its website to enhance customer service
• The marketing team is investigating the potential of virtual reality for digital showrooms
• Future campaigns will focus on showcasing Elexion's commitment to sustainability and zero-emission transportation
• The company is also considering partnerships with influencers and celebrities to promote their brand
subsections.justification: This slide discusses future plans and strategies, not the success of the past customer testimonial campaign.

conclusion: The customer testimonial campaign significantly contributed to our social media engagement. Moving forward, we need to leverage these insights to optimize our future digital marketing strategies.

image_queries.slide_title: Implications on Future Digital Marketing Strategies
